params.lat: number — user latitude in decimal degrees
params.lon: number — user longitude in decimal degrees
params.radiusMeters: number — search radius for the Overpass around filter

resolvesTo.stores: array of { name: string, address: string, lat: number, lon: number }

notes: section-4 (app shell) calls findNearbyLiquorStores after location is resolved, awaits the promise, and routes the result: status 'ok' -> hand stores to section-3 for selection/presentation; status 'empty' -> shell may retry with a larger radiusMeters before showing the empty state; status 'error' -> shell shows the error state using message. The lookup never throws — failures are reported via status. The shell decides retry/radius-widening policy; section-2 only executes a single query per call.
